key_insight: A minimum measurement standard for LLM-as-a-judge in multi-hop RAG evaluations can clarify the implications of retrieval and answer quality.
engineering_relevance: This methodology enhances the fairness and accuracy of evaluations in AI-driven decision-making systems.
method: Fixes the top-100 candidate pool and evidence budget.
Requires pre-registered hypotheses and cluster-aware inference.
Conducts second-judge replication and an exact cluster sign-flip check.
evidence_signal: The study demonstrates that cluster-aware inference significantly alters the results of semantic baseline comparisons.
watch_item: Clustered benchmarks may lead to overestimated progress in RAG system evaluations.
paper_title: A Fixed-Budget, Cluster-Aware Standard for LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation: A Multi-Hop RAG Stress Test
